notes: Second band take (Peggy.m4a, ~66kbps AAC, 408.6s). Higher pace/energy than the Feb 26 take; bassist off that day. Confirmed by the band: first sung line at 0:56, 'if ever I return' re-entry at 5:03 (muffled vocal on re-entry). Other boundaries are approximate: intro start ~0:30 per band recall; vocals-end-before-jam (~2:58) and end-of-vocals (~6:40) inferred from the rung-3 mel P(vocal) curve. Block sections named verse_1 / verse_5 so probe anchor logic works: only their START times are confirmed per-verse boundaries; each block spans four verses. 178-181s left unlabeled as a guard band around the inferred vocals->jam boundary.

sections.notes: Pre-song; intro starts ~0:30 per band recall
Verses 1-4 block; start confirmed by band (0:56), end inferred (vocals wind down ~2:58)
Start inferred (guard band 178-181 unlabeled); end confirmed by band
Verses 5-8 block; start confirmed by band (5:03, muffled re-entry), end inferred (~6:40)
